name: google-analytics-baby
description: Google Analytics 4 read-only marketing analytics for ads.

interface.shortDescription: Analyze ads performance with GA4 read-only data.
interface.longDescription: GA4 MCP server for listing properties, running reports, auditing campaign tracking, and pulling Google Ads cost/ROAS context from Analytics.
defaultPrompt: Show campaign performance for the selected GA4 property.
Audit campaign tracking quality for paid traffic.
